creator: tijl@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi Sean, George,

Can you review/test the attached patch for synergy-devel?
It fixes this PR: http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/182156
Redports buildlogs: https://redports.org/buildarchive/20131019163500-51438/

The patch disables the test subdirectory.  It makes heavy use of the
std::tr1 namespace where gcc has put all C++11 features before they
were standardised.  In libc++ everything is in the std namespace.

The patch also fixes the issue that "operator void*" on a stream is
no longer valid in C++11, and libc++ does not support it.
